summary: No-ship: the declared scope cannot pass the existing required gate, and the replacement test strategy misses the dirty-index failure central to H-2.
triage: review-gate SKILL.md rules govern: render EVERY finding as a full table row, the human decides each row (accept/reject/defer/question — free text), echo back before applying, max 2 rounds, append decisions.md and COMMIT it with this artifact.

findings.title: The design omits migration of the enforced call-site contract gate
findings.body: The design reduces the workflow to a one-line runner call but lists only `test_bump-poll-toctou.bats` for migration. The existing `tests/gates/test_bump-poll-callsite.bats` extracts a workflow step containing `bump-tag` and requires the inline branch→bump→commit→ensure order, verbatim lane forwarding, effective writer identity, remote-mutation ownership, and real-git isolation witnesses. The proposed workflow necessarily makes those required tests fail; deleting or weakening them would instead remove approval-gate and mutation-ownership evidence.
findings.recommendation: Add `tests/gates/test_bump-poll-callsite.bats` to the migration scope. Split its assertions between the thin workflow→runner boundary and runner-level execution tests, preserving every existing contract and mutation witness.

findings.title: The test matrix never creates the staged-residue state it claims to contain
findings.body: The proposed failure cases stop at a `bump-tag` failure or a stubbed `ensure-bump-pr` failure. The latter occurs after a successful commit, when the index is already clean; ordinary `bump-tag` validation failures occur before `git add`. Nothing forces failure after `git add` or after the first real file write, so cleanup can be incorrectly scoped around only the executor and still pass. That leaves the exact H-2 path—commit failure with staged writePath and digest-exporter changes—unproved.
findings.recommendation: Add a real-git scenario that fails `git commit` after staging, plus a post-write `bump-tag` failure. Assert the next item’s commit contains only its paths, all worktrees are removed, the run continues, and the final exit is non-zero; retain a cleanup-removal mutation witness.

next_steps: Revise the design’s change surface to migrate the existing call-site gate.
Expand the isolation test matrix to cover post-write and post-stage failures before implementation.
